extra.reason: Set kubeflow-profiles/oauth2-proxy chart admin defaults to empty; externalized kiali root_domain to a variable wired from account module. grep clean, hclfmt+fmt clean.

Restricted ml-pipeline-ui AuthorizationPolicy to cluster.local/ns/kubeflow/sa/oauth2-proxy (mirrors dashboard/profiles); removed orphaned ingress.sa value. helm template + lint clean. metadata-grpc-service & service-cache-server kept allow-all (out-of-mesh callers); follow-up filed.

Replaced misleading inbound-cidrs=0.0.0.0/0 comment (grafana, kiali) and added matching accurate comment (dex, dashboard) across all four shared-ALB admin ingresses. Comment-only; value unchanged. terraform fmt clean on all four modules.

Wrapped exec in dynamic block gated on var.kube_data_auth_enabled in common/kube-provider.hcl and common/helm-provider.hcl (apply/flag=true keeps exec token-expiry fix; plan/flag=false drops exec -> kubeconfig fallback). Updated stale description naming the removed aws_eks_cluster_auth data source across all 12 variables.tf. terragrunt hclfmt clean; no aws_eks_cluster_auth references remain.

Moved route53 zone lookup into account module (data.aws_route53_zone.root + output root_zone_id); added mock root_zone_id; rewired dex/prometheus/kiali/kubeflow to consume var.root_zone_id from dependency.account.outputs.root_zone_id instead of their own live lookup. make plan-all now plans all modules cleanly: account does the single live lookup (Z0873790MAHSTW1NBQTC), consumers plan with mock zone_id (acm validation record known-after-apply). terraform fmt + terragrunt hclfmt clean.

All 3 workflows: added 'Install Terraform' step (hashicorp/setup-terraform@b9cd54a v3.1.2, terraform_version from env tf_version=1.9.8, wrapper off) after AWS creds; replaced tofu_version/tf_version action inputs with tf_path: terraform (satisfies action.yml mise-check and makes Terragrunt use the terraform binary; default tfpath is terraform anyway). env renamed tofu_version->tf_version. .tool-versions unchanged (still terraform 1.9.8). YAML validated. Not committed.
